name: RETROCAVAL URETER

demographics.Etiology: abnormality in embryogenesis of IVC with persistence of right posterior cardinal vein

dominant_finding: varying degrees of hydronephrosis + proximal hydrouretero-nephrosis
discriminating_features: proximal right ureter swings medially over pedicle of L3-4, passes behind IVC, and emerges
varying degrees of hydronephrosis + proximal hydrouretero-nephrosis

general: proximal right ureter swings medially over pedicle of L3-4, passes behind IVC, and emerges
varying degrees of hydronephrosis + proximal hydrouretero-nephrosis
